name: Claude Code CLI
description: Installs the Claude Code CLI on a selectable channel.

configDir.description: If set, exports CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR to this path (persist it by mounting a volume there). Empty leaves Claude's ~/.claude default.

disableNonessentialTraffic.description: Set CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC=1 to suppress telemetry and other non-essential network calls.
